display.purpose: Dates, times, greetings, and the wordmark ONLY. Never body copy.

body.purpose: Notes, descriptions, and all reading text.

label.purpose: Category names on moment-card bands and typed micro-labels.

shadows.name: moment-rest
shadows.purpose: Resting lift of a moment card in light mode — a warm, barely-there shadow.

shadows.name: moment-hover
shadows.purpose: Moment card rising toward the reader on hover (light mode).

shadows.name: moment-rest-dark
shadows.purpose: Resting moment-card lift on espresso — the one place true-black shadow is allowed.

shadows.name: moment-hover-dark
shadows.purpose: Moment card hover lift in dark mode.

motion.name: shadow-lift
motion.purpose: Moment cards transition shadow only on hover — no layout shift.

motion.name: color-state
motion.purpose: Nav pills and hover states transition color only.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single most-important action on a surface — amber fill, ink text.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:8px; height:36px; padding:8px 16px; background:#d8a24a; color:#3b342b; font-family:Inter,system-ui,sans-serif; font-weight:500; font-size:14px; border:none; border-radius:12px; cursor:pointer; transition:background .2s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background:#cf9740; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline:none; box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(111,128,67,0.5); }

components.name: Interactive Button
components.description: The app's true 'act here' button — sage fill for logging, saving, toggles.
components.css: .ds-btn-interactive { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:8px; height:36px; padding:8px 16px; background:#a7bd7f; color:#3b342b; font-family:Inter,system-ui,sans-serif; font-weight:500; font-size:14px; border:none; border-radius:12px; cursor:pointer; transition:background .2s; } .ds-btn-interactive:hover { background:#9cb372; } .ds-btn-interactive:focus-visible { outline:none; box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(111,128,67,0.5); }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Lower-priority action — warm background, hairline border, accent hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:8px; height:36px; padding:8px 16px; background:#f7f3ec; color:#3b342b; font-family:Inter,system-ui,sans-serif; font-weight:500; font-size:14px; border:1px solid rgba(90,70,45,0.15); border-radius:12px; cursor:pointer; transition:background .2s,color .2s; box-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(90,70,45,0.06); } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background:#ede0c8; color:#5c4a2e; } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline:none; box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(111,128,67,0.5); }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: Recessed warm field with a warm stroke; sage focus ring.
components.css: .ds-input { height:36px; width:220px; padding:4px 12px; background:#f2eadd; color:#3b342b; font-family:Inter,system-ui,sans-serif; font-size:16px; border:1px solid #e3d8c4; border-radius:12px; outline:none; transition:border-color .2s,box-shadow .2s; } .ds-input::placeholder { color:#736550; } .ds-input:focus-visible { border-color:#6f8043; box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(111,128,67,0.5); }

components.name: Nav Pill Group
components.description: Sage-tinted rounded track holding the Capture / Review pills; active pill fills with sage.
components.css: .ds-nav { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:4px; padding:4px; background:#efe6d6; border-radius:9999px; } .ds-nav-pill { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:6px; min-height:40px; padding:0 16px; font-family:Inter,system-ui,sans-serif; font-size:14px; font-weight:500; color:#6b5a3e; border-radius:9999px; text-decoration:none; cursor:pointer; transition:color .2s; } .ds-nav-pill:hover { color:#3b342b; } .ds-nav-pill--active { background:#a7bd7f; color:#3b342b; box-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(90,70,45,0.1); }

components.name: Category Chip
components.description: Category-tinted pill — background mixed ~32% toward the category token, text darkened for contrast.
components.html: Achievement
components.css: .ds-chip { --cat:#5f6e38; display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:6px; padding:4px 10px; font-family:Inter,system-ui,sans-serif; font-size:12px; font-weight:700; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.05em; border-radius:9999px; background:color-mix(in srgb, var(--cat) 32%, #fffdf8); color:color-mix(in srgb, var(--cat) 40%, #3b342b); border:1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--cat) 45%, transparent); }

components.name: Moment Card
components.description: The signature component: a diary entry with a category-tinted band, handwritten time, and a note on genuinely ruled paper.
components.html:
Interesting2:14 pm

Found a cleaner way to snap the ruled lines to the text baseline.
components.css: .ds-moment { --cat:#c28a2e; width:260px; overflow:hidden; background:#fffdf8; border:1px solid rgba(90,70,45,0.15); border-radius:14px; box-shadow:0 2px 8px -4px rgba(90,70,45,0.10); transition:box-shadow .2s; } .ds-moment:hover { box-shadow:0 10px 28px -10px rgba(90,70,45,0.18); } .ds-moment-band { display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; gap:8px; padding:6px 10px; background:color-mix(in srgb, var(--cat) 32%, #fffdf8); color:color-mix(in srgb, var(--cat) 40%, #3b342b); border-bottom:1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--cat) 45%, transparent); } .ds-moment-cat { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:6px; font-family:Inter,system-ui,sans-serif; font-size:12px; font-weight:700; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.03em; } .ds-moment-time { font-family:Caveat,ui-rounded,cursive; font-size:18px; line-height:1.1; } .ds-moment-note { margin:0; padding:8px 10px 10px; color:#3b342b; font-family:Inter,system-ui,sans-serif; font-size:14px; line-height:26px; background-image:repeating-linear-gradient(to bottom, transparent 0, transparent 25px, color-mix(in srgb, var(--cat) 20%, rgba(90,70,45,0.15)) 25px, color-mix(in srgb, var(--cat) 20%, rgba(90,70,45,0.15)) 26px); }

narrative.overview: Moments is a personal journal you actually want to open. The whole system is built to feel like cream paper under a warm desk lamp: unhurried, tactile, and quietly personal. Moments are logged as diary entries on ruled paper, dates and times are set in a handwritten hand, and the surface everywhere reads as warm paper rather than cold UI chrome. The palette is a committed warm neutral — a cream body, off-white paper cards, and soft brown-black ink, with amber as the identity color and a pastel sage green reserved for interactive actions. The dark theme is not an inversion but a second scene: deep espresso with the same amber warming it, as if the same diary were open at night. This system explicitly rejects the SaaS-tool aesthetic: no cold blue-grays, no neon, no glassmorphism, no gradient text, no hero-metric template.
keyCharacteristics: Warm cream-paper surfaces with soft brown-black ink; amber is identity, sage green is action — the two never blur.
A handwritten accent font (Caveat) used only for dates, times, greetings, and the wordmark — never body text.
Diary-entry moment cards: a category-tinted header band, the note on genuinely ruled paper, and a hover-revealed edit/delete affordance.
Five warm categorical accents (mood, achievement, learning, interesting, challenge) that stay muted and legible in both themes.
Flat by default; shadow appears only as a response to elevation or hover.

rules.name: The Two-Voice Rule
rules.body: Amber is identity; sage is action. A user must never wonder which color means 'click me' — filled sage always does. Amber fills are reserved for the single primary CTA and brand moments.

rules.name: The No-Gray Rule
rules.body: There are no true grays in this system. Every 'gray' is a warm brown mixed toward the cream. A cold #888 anywhere is a bug.

rules.name: The Handwriting-Is-Sacred Rule
rules.body: Caveat is only for dates, times, greetings, and the wordmark. It never sets body copy, button labels, form fields, or paragraphs.

rules.name: The One-Weight-Family Rule
rules.body: Hierarchy comes from Inter's weight (400 to 500 to 700) and size, not from a third font. Do not introduce a second sans.

rules.name: The Warm-Shadow Rule
rules.body: In light mode, every shadow is tinted brown (rgba(90,70,45,...)), never rgba(0,0,0,...). A neutral-black shadow on cream paper looks like a bruise.

rules.name: The Flat-At-Rest Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat or near-flat at rest. Shadow is a response to state (hover, elevation, focus), not a default decoration.

dos: Do keep amber for identity and sage green for action. Filled sage (#a7bd7f) is always 'act here'; amber (#d8a24a) is the brand and the single primary CTA.
Do reserve Caveat handwriting for dates, times, greetings, and the wordmark only.
Do make every surface warm paper (#fffdf8) on cream (#f7f3ec) with soft brown-black ink (#3b342b).
Do tint shadows and borders brown (rgba(90,70,45,...)) in light mode.
Do keep body and metadata text at or above 4.5:1 — use muted-ink (#736550) for secondary text and amber-ink (#8c5e18) for amber link text on cream.
Do use the category chart tokens (--chart-1...--chart-5) for all categorical color.
Do keep surfaces flat at rest; let shadow be a response to hover/focus/elevation.
Do use an integer-pixel line-height period for the ruled-note gradient (26px), or Safari drifts the rules off the text.
donts: Don't introduce cold grays, blue-grays, or a #000 shadow on light surfaces — this is the SaaS-tool look the diary rejects.
Don't use the bright amber (#d8a24a) for small text on cream; it fails contrast. Use amber-ink.
Don't set body copy, buttons, or form fields in Caveat.
Don't blur amber and sage into one 'accent' — the two-voice separation is the point.
Don't reach for gradient text, background-clip: text, glassmorphism, or a big-number hero-metric block.
Don't add drop shadows as default decoration; flat-at-rest is the rule.
Don't use border-left/border-right colored stripes on cards or list items; the category color lives in the header band and ruled lines.
Don't invent a third font or a second sans.
